_meta: Unbiased ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API pull, 2026-05-30. Pre-specified query: interventional, COMPLETED, Phase 2 or 3, condition in {Schizophrenia, Alzheimer Disease, Fragile X Syndrome, ...}, term=cognition. Fetched via the v2 API (direct httpx WAF-blocked from this host; pulled through the WebFetch transport). totalCount per slice recorded in `query_totals`. This file is the raw provenance; cognition-PRIMARY filtering + outcome adjudication happen in scripts/89_ctgov_pull.py.
